incident_summary: Temperature excursion in cold room CR-05 — reached 13.2°C for 1.6 hours. Limit 2–8°C. Batch D3136A and 5 other product batches potentially affected.
root_cause_detail: Refrigeration compressor failed overnight. Night shift operator did not respond to alarm within required 15 minutes — response was {round(random.uniform(45,120),0)} minutes after initial alarm.
corrective_action: Compressor replaced. All affected batches quarantined and thermal stability assessments initiated per product stability data. Engineering root cause investigation completed.
preventive_action: 24/7 alarm escalation: unacknowledged alarm after 10 minutes auto-escalates to on-call engineer via SMS. Backup refrigeration unit installed in critical cold rooms. Alarm response training refreshed for all shifts.
effectiveness_check: Zero temperature excursions exceeding 30 minutes for 12 months. 100% alarm response within 15 minutes on monthly alarm log review.
